notes: No standalone rate table. Item 184 para 3 provides shuttle service (smaller equipment / extra labor to transfer shipment between origin/destination and nearest point of safe approach) at rates no higher than Item 320 hourly rates; in addition to all other transportation/accessorial charges. Item 320 max = $398.40 (Double Time, unit of equipment + two persons, Territory A, governing per NOTE 1). Straight-time two-person Terr A = $234.39; one-person straight = $145.99. If shipper refuses delivery at nearest safe approach, Item 96 applies.

Maximum fixed per-article rates (basis = Each). Range from $96.38 (e.g. motorcycles over 250cc parts, riding mowers <25hp, snowmobiles/golf carts, satellite dish 4ft or less) up to $334.55 (satellite TV/radio receiving dish over 12 ft). Other examples: automobiles/trucks/vans $188.98; campers (mounted or unmounted) $274.28; pipe/grand pianos/harpsichords $122.65; playhouses/tool sheds & hot tubs/spas $180.70; boat/canoe trailers $108.42. Loading & unloading charges include both load and unload service and apply each time, including SIT (Item 164 applies even to distance-rated shipments containing these articles).

Weight additives in pounds-per-linear-foot added to net scale weight; transportation then charged at the distance (per-cwt) rate of Item 310/390. Max additive = 300 lbs per linear foot (travel camper trailers & mini-mobile homes, other than utility/pop-up). Others: airplanes/gliders 120 lbs/linear ft; sailboats 14ft+ 125; boats 14ft+ 115; canoes/skiffs/light rowboats/kayaks 14ft+ 40; boat trailers 75. NOTE 6: light-and-bulky flat charge OR weight additive may apply for listed items in disassembled/partially disassembled condition.

Only rate named within the item is the per-stop additive: an additional charge of not more than $134.45 for each stop to load between first point of origin and final point of origin. Composite shipment itself is charged at hourly rates (Item 320, max $398.40) or at distance/per-cwt rates (Items 310/390); under hourly, applicable rate for total loading/unloading time PLUS double the driving time between component points. Composite shipment paid by a single debtor.

Only rate named within the item is the per-stop additive: an additional charge of not more than $134.45 each stop to unload between first point of destination and final point of destination. Composite shipment itself is charged at hourly rates (Item 320, max $398.40) or at distance/per-cwt rates (Items 310/390); under hourly, applicable rate for total loading/unloading time PLUS double the driving time between component points. Composite shipment paid by a single debtor.

accessorial: Split Pickup and Split Delivery in Combination
notes: Only rate named within the item is the per-stop additive: an additional charge of not more than $134.45 for each stop to load or unload between first point of origin and final point of destination. Entire shipment must be picked up within 24-hour period, minimum of four (4) component parts, paid by a single debtor. Composite shipment charged at hourly rates (Item 320, max $398.40) or distance/per-cwt rates (Item 310); under hourly, total loading/unloading time PLUS double the driving time between component points. Does not apply to SIT shipments (Item 160).
